requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a minimal studio cyclorama in warm grey-beige. Use adult model with a refined, androgynous look as the only moving person or hand. A simple chrome garment rack. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single, static-camera studio shot in a warm grey-beige cyclorama with a matte concrete floor. At center is a simple chrome garment rack holding an oatmeal beige long trench coat on a wooden hanger. Soft neutral fill light bathes the scene, and a subtle spotlight circle sits on the floor beneath the rack. After a brief beat, an adult model in a black fitted turtleneck and slim black trousers enters smoothly from the right. They lift the trench from the hanger and, in one controlled motion, drape it over their shoulders. As the coat settles, the spotlight gently intensifies and shifts slightly forward so that the coat’s shadow stretches long toward the camera, exaggerating a tall, refined silhouette. The model takes a small step forward. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.

image_inputs.description: Video start frame used as first-frame I2V conditioning by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional start-frame image-edit generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Exaggerate lets us amplify the key benefit—an elegant, elongated silhouette—through a bold but credible lighting shift that dramatically lengthens the coat’s shadow while highlighting the silk-cotton sheen, all within a single clean studio shot.

candidate_categories.reason: Strong visual hook via spotlight and extended shadow sells silhouette instantly while staying grounded in a studio setting.
candidate_categories.risk: Cloth movement and dressing can glitch; keep action simple and controlled.

candidate_categories.reason: Polished, slow editorial treatment fits Burberry’s luxury feel and shows material quality.
candidate_categories.risk: May lack a clear attention hook in a short 6s spot.

candidate_categories.reason: Close, steady details of fabric and tailoring could prove quality credibly.
candidate_categories.risk: Tiny stitching or pattern details are hard for small models; risks unreadable micro-details.

creative_design.selling_angle: The trench visually lengthens and refines your silhouette, with a subtle silk-cotton sheen that looks premium from any angle.
creative_design.emotional_tone: Confident, elegant, editorial-calm with a bold visual beat.
creative_design.visual_grammar: Single editorial studio shot; bold lighting ramp that exaggerates the coat’s length via an elongated shadow; smooth model movement.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: Dramatic but plausible lighting change that elongates the coat’s shadow to emphasize silhouette, plus a gentle sheen pass across the silk-cotton faille.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: A focused spotlight swells on the hanging coat, beginning to stretch its shadow across the floor.
creative_design.action_arc: From a minimalist studio, a model steps in, lifts the trench from a rack, drapes it over shoulders; the spotlight intensifies, the shadow lengthens toward camera, and the model takes a controlled step and quarter turn to present the refined silhouette and fabric sheen.
creative_design.payoff: A poised final stance with the coat settled elegantly on shoulders, long shadow on the floor, showcasing the refined oatmeal silhouette.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: Kept to one static studio scene with a single clothing rack. Avoided sleeve threading to reduce garment deformation; model simply drapes the coat over shoulders. Exaggeration uses a safe, large lighting change and shadow elongation rather than complex cloth dynamics. No mirrors, patterns, or text in-scene; minimal props for stability.

metadata.overlay_text:
Refined silhouette
Silk-cotton faille
Burberry Foxfield
metadata.audio_direction: Modern minimalist fashion beat with a soft low-end pulse; a subtle swell as the spotlight intensifies. No voiceover.
metadata.visual_prompt: A single, static-camera studio shot in a warm grey-beige cyclorama with a matte concrete floor. At center is a simple chrome garment rack holding an oatmeal beige long trench coat on a wooden hanger. Soft neutral fill light bathes the scene, and a subtle spotlight circle sits on the floor beneath the rack. After a brief beat, an adult model in a black fitted turtleneck and slim black trousers enters smoothly from the right. They lift the trench from the hanger and, in one controlled motion, drape it over their shoulders. As the coat settles, the spotlight gently intensifies and shifts slightly forward so that the coat’s shadow stretches long toward the camera, exaggerating a tall, refined silhouette. The model takes a small step forward and performs a slow quarter turn, keeping movements minimal and calm. The silk-cotton faille catches a soft sheen as they angle, while the background remains clean and the rack stays in place behind them. The model finishes in a composed pose, slightly angled toward camera, one hand lightly adjusting a lapel, neutral confident expression, with the extended shadow clearly visible on the floor.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with steady one-take continuity

complete direct prompt: A single, static-camera studio shot in a warm grey-beige cyclorama with a matte concrete floor. At center is a simple chrome garment rack holding an oatmeal beige long trench coat on a wooden hanger. Soft neutral fill light bathes the scene, and a subtle spotlight.
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Finding a trench that actually flatters the body with a long, refined silhouette and looks truly premium up close.
Focus the judgment on the requested product action, proof visibility, and one-take continuity.

Creative design expectation: ad_category=exaggerate; hook=A focused spotlight swells on the hanging coat, beginning to stretch its shadow across the floor.; proof=Dramatic but plausible lighting change that elongates the coat’s shadow to emphasize silhouette, plus a gentle sheen pass across the silk-cotton faille.; payoff=A poised final stance.

Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: Adult model with a refined, androgynous look and neutral expression.; Black fitted turtleneck and slim black trousers with simple black low-heel boots.
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
ad_category intent is recognizable through the opening, action arc, proof mechanism, and payoff
